support.title: Support & Contact
support.subtitle: Our team is at your disposal to support you in using Procura.
support.intro: Our team of engineers and experts is available to answer all your technical, commercial, or functional questions.

email.title: By Email
email.desc: Write to us at any time regarding your questions or bug reports. Fast response guaranteed.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Support
whatsapp.desc: Need urgent help? Chat directly with a technical expert via WhatsApp.

youtube.title: Training and Tutorials on YouTube
youtube.desc: Exclusive videos on how to master our AI tools and integrate Procura into your business.

form.title: Send a Message
form.subtitle: Fill in the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
form.name: Full name
form.subject: Subject
form.successDesc: We have received your message and will get back to you very soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Procura, the security and confidentiality of your data are our top priority. This privacy policy details what information we collect, how we use it, and the strict measures we take to protect it.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: This policy applies to all our ERP, financial management services, and our AI assistant 'Copilote'.

data.title: 2. Data Collected
data.content: We collect the following types of information:
items: Professional data: Company name, SIRET, VAT numbers.
User information: Email addresses, names, and job titles.
Analytical data: Connection logs, AI interactions.
Documents: Purchase orders, receipts, PDF invoices.

usage.title: 3. Data Usage
usage.content: Your data is only used to provide and optimize the services offered. We never sell your data to third parties.

ai.title: 4. Artificial Intelligence
ai.content: Your private data is not used to publicly train external AI models.

security.title: 5. Security and Hosting
security.content: Data hosted in Europe (GDPR) with AES-256 encryption.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using Procura, you agree to be bound by these general terms of use.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.content: Procura provides a business management platform integrating AI, invoicing, and inventory management.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials.
